content:
type: REVISE
my_files: dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py
your_files: dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py
note: My feature (debug trace-logging) is spec'd to land in streaming_listener.py too - it adds debug/debug_logger params to __init__ and guarded DEBUG log calls inside existing methods (start detection, end detection, emit chunk, flush, reset). I won't touch tick()/idle_timeout logic or add new methods. Suggest: you add idle_timeout_s/tick() as new/separate code (e.g. new method + its own __init__ kwargs), I'll add debug/debug_logger as separate __init__ kwargs + log lines inline in existing methods. We each stick to our own added lines so git merge should apply cleanly. OK to proceed in parallel on this basis?
